features.title: Node-Board Creation UI
features.description: Allow an authenticated user to create the first node board for a goal space from the goal-space detail page using the existing node-board API.
acceptance_criteria: Feature only adds a browser node-board creation surface on the goal-space detail page.
No backend, API, database, schema, migration, or authorization changes are made.
No P3-04 browser-first E2E rewrites are included.
Component exports CreateNodeBoardForm as a named client component.
Component requires goalSpaceId: string as a prop.
Form has accessible labels exactly Board key, Board name, and Description.
Idle submit button text is exactly Create node board.
Successful submit posts JSON to /api/v1/goal-spaces/${goalSpaceId}/node-boards with method POST, credentials include, and content-type application/json.
Request body includes key, name, and description strings (description may be empty string).
Successful submit resets the form and calls router.refresh().
API envelope error renders envelope.error.message and does not refresh.
Thrown fetch error renders Unable to create node board. and does not refresh.
UI uses design tokens/CSS variables with no hardcoded hex or tracking/letter-spacing classes in P3-03 files.
goal-space-shell.tsx renders <CreateNodeBoardForm goalSpaceId={goalSpaceId} /> inside the boards.length === 0 branch alongside the existing EmptyState caption.
Existing NodeBoardView branch is preserved unchanged for boards.length > 0.
dependencies: Existing createNodeBoard API wrapper at apps/web/src/lib/api/node-boards.ts
test_needs: Focused UI component test for success
Focused UI component test for API envelope error
Focused UI component test for thrown fetch error
Requested lint, typecheck, format, and diff checks
definition_of_done: Required tests pass or documented exceptions are recorded
Required verification matrix items pass or have documented exceptions
